ddls:
CREATE TABLE "laptops" (
  "laptop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laptop */,
  "company" TEXT /* Manufacturer company name */,
  "product" TEXT /* Product name of the laptop */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Type of laptop (e.g., Ultrabook, Notebook) */,
  "inches" REAL /* Screen size in inches */,
  "screen_resolution" TEXT /* Screen resolution of the laptop */,
  "cpu" TEXT /* CPU specifications */,
  "ram" TEXT /* Amount of RAM */,
  "memory" TEXT /* Storage capacity and type */,
  "gpu" TEXT /* GPU specifications */,
  "op_sys" TEXT /* Operating system installed */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the laptop in kg */,
  "price_euros" REAL /* Price of the laptop in euros */,
  "processor_manufacturer" TEXT /* Processor manufacturer */,
  "processor_model" TEXT /* Processor model */,
  "ram_type" TEXT /* Type of RAM */,
  "storage_type" TEXT /* Type of storage */,
  "graphics_card" TEXT /* Graphics card model */,
  "operating_system_version" TEXT /* Operating system version */,
  "battery_life" REAL /* Battery life in hours */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period in months */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laptop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the inventory record */,
  "laptop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the laptop's ID */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the laptop is available */,
  "store_location" TEXT /* Location of the store where the laptop is available */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of laptops available in stock */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the laptop was last restocked */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of laptops sold from the current inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_laptop_id FOREIGN KEY ("laptop_id") REFERENCES laptops ("laptop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "laptop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laptop sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the laptop was sold */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of laptops sold in the transaction */,
  "sale_method" TEXT /* Method of sale (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the sale */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the sale including taxes and discounts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_laptop_id FOREIGN KEY ("laptop_id") REFERENCES laptops ("laptop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return transaction */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sale id associated with the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the laptop was returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_reason_code" TEXT /* Reason code for the return (e.g., defective, not as described) */,
  "return_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the return (e.g., refund, replacement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warranties" (
  "warranty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warranty record */,
  "laptop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laptop covered by the warranty */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the warranty */,
  "warranty_start" TEXT /* Start date of the warranty period */,
  "warranty_end" TEXT /* End date of the warranty period */,
  "warranty_type" TEXT /* Type of warranty (e.g., standard, extended) */,
  "warranty_status" TEXT /* Status of the warranty (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warranty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warranties_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warranties_laptop_id FOREIGN KEY ("laptop_id") REFERENCES laptops ("laptop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the store */,
  "store_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  "store_email" TEXT /* Email address of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)
